summary: Testing completed for user registration fix and TTS language codes. Backend: 9/9 auth tests passed. Frontend: Registration form and login working correctly. TTS cross-platform helpers verified in code (Web Speech API on web, expo-speech on native).
critical_code_review_comments: TTS language codes correctly configured: it-IT, es-ES, en-US, de-DE, fr-FR, pt-BR in both frontend languageStore.ts and backend server.py
Cross-platform TTS helpers correctly implemented in bible.tsx, index.tsx, and feelings.tsx using Web Speech API on web and expo-speech on native
showAlert helper in register.tsx correctly uses window.alert on web platform instead of Alert.alert
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during registration tests (auto-cleaned by unique UUIDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent:
User registration and TTS fixes verified. Key findings:
1. POST /api/auth/register works correctly - creates new users and returns session_token
2. All auth endpoints working: login, logout, delete-account
3. TTS language codes configured correctly for all 6 languages
4. Cross-platform TTS helpers use Web Speech API on web, expo-speech on native
5. showAlert helper uses window.alert on web for registration form alerts

Note: TTS functionality cannot be fully tested via automation - requires manual verification to confirm audio output in different languages.

rca_of_the_issue:
Original issues reported:
1. TTS not working for other languages (es, en, de, fr, pt) - FIXED: Cross-platform TTS helpers now use Web Speech API on web with correct language codes (es-ES, en-US, de-DE, fr-FR, pt-BR)
2. User registration not working - FIXED: showAlert helper uses window.alert on web instead of Alert.alert which doesn't work on web platform
